summary: UI Cleanup Feature Testing Complete - All 6 features verified and working correctly. System Status popover, Bot Mode dropdown with tooltips, and removal of Live/Offline dot all implemented as expected.

system_status_popover.details: Single 'Partial' button in HeaderBar. Click opens popover showing 3 services: Quotes Stream (connected), IB Gateway (disconnected with Reconnect button), Ollama AI. Icons show status correctly (green checkmark/red X).

bot_mode_dropdown.details: Bot Mode dropdown in StatsHeader shows 'Bot Off' or mode name. Opens to show Auto/Confirm/Paused options with icons. Currently 'Confirm' mode is selected (shown with checkmark).

bot_mode_tooltips.details: Hovering over mode options shows descriptive tooltips. Verified: 'Auto Mode - Autonomous Mode: Bot executes trades automatically based on scanner signals...'

no_live_offline_in_ai_panel.details: AI Trading Assistant header shows only 'AI Trading Assistant' with subtitle 'Scanner • AI • Bot'. No Live/Offline status dot present in the AI Panel header.

bot_stats_display.details: Stats displayed below Bot Mode dropdown button: P&L (+$0), open count (0 open), pending count shown when > 0.

start_stop_bot_button.details: Start Bot/Stop Bot button at bottom of Bot Mode dropdown. Shows 'Start Bot' when bot is off.

overall_system_status_indicator.details: System Status button shows overall status: 'Partial' (amber color) when some services connected. Would show 'All Systems Online' (green) or 'Systems Offline' (red) based on connection states.

critical_code_review_comments: SystemStatusPopover component (lines 300-461 in HeaderBar.jsx) is well-structured with proper click-outside handling
BotModeDropdown component (lines 1210-1401 in AICommandPanel.jsx) implements all modes with correct icons and tooltip content
AI Panel header (around line 2126-2144) correctly shows only title without status indicators
data-testid attributes properly added: system-status-trigger, bot-mode-dropdown, bot-mode-option-autonomous, bot-mode-option-confirmation, bot-mode-option-paused, bot-power-toggle
context_for_next_testing_agent: UI cleanup implementation is complete and working. System Status popover consolidates WS/IB/Ollama status into one button. Bot Mode dropdown replaces old toggle+buttons with single dropdown showing Auto/Confirm/Paused with tooltips. Live/Offline dot removed from AI Panel header. All data-testid attributes are in place for testing.
